nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: San Andres vireo
nodes.summary: San Andres vireo（San Andres vireo，学名 Vireo caribaeus），在图谱中标记为易危（VU）物种，常见栖息地包括沼泽，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏。

nodes.name: 沼泽
nodes.summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

nodes.name: VU
nodes.summary: VU表示 IUCN 易危等级，当前关联694种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、索马里鸵鸟、大斑几维鸟等694种鸟类。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It occurs in a variety of habitats including woodland, cocoa plantations, scrubby pastures and mangrove swamps

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Due to habitat loss from the ever expanding population on these small islands, the species has now become limited to a few localities on the southern half of the island, but it is still common in some of these areas
